results.title: Paytm founder Vijay Shekhar Sharma, Arijit Singh, Badshah, others invest $3.75 million in thumpN
results.description: Live entertainment discovery and ticketing platform thumpN has raised over $3.75 million in pre-seed funding led by music icons Arijit Singh, Sunidhi Chauhan, and Badshah, alongside Paytm founder Vijay Shekhar Sharma, Paytm CFO Madhur Deora, Capitalmind co-founder Shray Chandra, and Hyperlink Brand Solutions founder VG Jairam. thumpN is an AI-based discovery and ticketing platform that helps users find live experiences based on their interests and preferences. The platform covers a range of categories, including concerts, comedy, nightlife, sports, festivals, and regional events. "This started from a simple frustration," said Varun Khare, CEO of thumpN. "Discovery today is fragmented across social feeds, algorithms, WhatsApp groups, and word of mouth. The explosion of India’s live entertainment market, combined with the shift toward conversational and AI-native consumer behaviour, has created an opportunity to rethink discovery from the ground up. We’re building thumpN to feel natural," Khare added. At the centre of the platform is Shadow, thumpN’s conversational AI agent, which enables users to discover live experiences through natural-language interactions rather than traditional search. Shadow interprets user intent, maintains conversational context, and processes event information from multiple sources. The platform also incorporates inputs from a network of contributing curators, including artists, promoters, venue insiders, and genre specialists across different cities. These inputs provide additional context to Shadow’s recommendations, combining AI-based analysis with human knowledge of local events and cultural trends. As fans interact with Shadow, it continuously refines recommendations based on evolving preferences, habits, and experience patterns. The platform also simplifies life for organisers, artists, venues, and promoters through AI-native onboarding and partner-first infrastructure, giving them sharper insights into their audiences and stronger tools to plan, market, and scale their events.
